items.title: Clean 8bc outreach/follow-up suppression-heavy list before next send
acceptance_criteria: Move or mark bounced/suppressed recipients from the latest follow-up probe out of active follow-up eligibility.
Prefer personal verified contacts before the next 8bc outreach batch; do not send to role-based or suppressed addresses.
Record the cleaned counts and next send-safe segment in the PNW/outreach ledger.
